## Directory Structure

```
perry-marshall/
├── _INDEX.md           ← This file
└── raw/
    ├── 80-20-masterclass-2024/     (26 files, 1.5MB)
    │   Sessions 1-6 audio + video + slides + worksheets
    │   Core: 80/20 fractals, subtraction, power laws, RFM, consulting
    │
    ├── google-ads-mastery/         (11 files + 2 book files, 1.9MB)
    │   Fundamentals series + 5 Live Modules + tools

    │   Book: Ultimate Guide to Google AdWords (2017)
    │   Core: Peel & Stick, Quality Score, bidding, Display, YouTube, Shopping
    │
    ├── new-renaissance-club/       (21 files, 617KB)
    │   3 Modules: Productivity, Clear Thinking, Money Faster
    │   Co-presenters: Bryan Todd, Jack Born, Laura Marshall

    │
    └── newsletter-archive/         (426 files, 7.2MB)
        Interviews, tips, case studies, webinar recordings
        Mixed speakers (Perry + many guests)
        Mostly mp3/mov transcriptions (2-60KB each)
```
